creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-01-14 11:15:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module collects ip validation routines to make input validation, and
  untainting easier and more readable.
  
  All functions return an untainted value if the test passes, and undef if it
  fails. This means that you should always check for a defined status
  explicitly. Don't assume the return will be true. (e.g. is_username('0'))
  
  The value to test is always the first (and often only) argument.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Data-Validate-IP/
  
  PR:             ports/119264
  Submitted by:   Tuc <freebsd-ports at t-b-o-h.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.143     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP/pkg-plist (new)
